name: Swiss Beef Birds
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the steak with a meat mallet until it is 1/4-inch thick, then cut into 6 serving pieces.
2. Cut each carrot into thin sticks and the pickle into 6 strips.
3. Place several carrot sticks and one pickle stick on each piece of meat.
4. Starting at the narrow end, roll up the meat, securing with small skewers or toothpicks.
5. Mix flour with salt, pepper, and garlic salt; coat the rolls, reserving the remaining mixture.
6. In a large skillet or slow-cooking pot with a frying unit, brown the meat rolls in hot oil. Pour off excess fat.
7. Place the browned meat into the slow-cooking pot.
8. Mix tomato sauce with the reserved flour and stir in onion.
9. Pour the mixture over the meat.
10. Cover and simmer on low for 7 to 9 hours, or until tender.
11. Sprinkle with parsley.
